site.name: SAJ Connect
site.description: SAJ Connect — specialist consultancy at the intersection of wireless communication and automotive innovation. From concept to live operations.

hero.headline: Connecting the Future of Mobility
hero.sub: We combine deep technical expertise across Telco and Automotive — delivering end-to-end engineering, testing and operations for Private 5G, eSIM, IoT and Connected Car.

pillars.label: 5G+
pillars.text: Private and public 5G expertise — from architecture to live operations.

pillars.label: E2E
pillars.text: End-to-end delivery across the full development and deployment lifecycle.

pillars.label: 6G
pillars.text: Forward-looking research and advisory for next-generation networks.
Complete coverage of wireless, IoT and automotive connectivity.

intersection.headline: Where wireless meets automotive
intersection.sub: Two of the most demanding domains in modern technology, brought together by a team that has shipped both.

items.title: End-to-End Delivery
items.text: From architecture and design through implementation, integration and live operations — one team, one accountable partner.

items.title: Vendor Agnostic
items.text: We choose the right technology for your problem — never tied to a single vendor or platform.

items.title: Global Ecosystem
items.text: A proven, scalable network of specialist partners — ready to deploy at the scale your project demands.

items.title: Mission Critical
items.text: We work on systems where reliability and safety matter most — and we treat your project the same way.

cta.headline: Let's build something exceptional
cta.sub: Get in touch to discuss how SAJ Connect can support your next project — from initial scoping to full-scale deployment and beyond.

services.title: Our Core Technology Domains
services.lead: Eight focused domains where we deliver expertise at depth — combine them into the solution your project needs.

domains.title: Private 5G
domains.description: Network engineering, design, deployment and operations for enterprise and industrial Private 5G.

domains.title: eSIM & iSIM
domains.description: End-to-end eSIM and iSIM ecosystem — RSP, profile management, lifecycle and certification.

domains.title: IoT Connectivity
domains.description: Connectivity strategies for massive IoT — cellular, LPWA, satellite, and hybrid architectures.

domains.title: NTN — Non-Terrestrial Networks
domains.description: Satellite-5G integration, NTN architecture and feasibility for global, resilient connectivity.

domains.title: 6G — Next Generation
domains.description: 6G readiness, advisory and research — preparation today for the networks of tomorrow.

domains.title: Connectivity Platform
domains.description: Platforms that abstract complexity — from connectivity management to telemetry and analytics.

domains.title: V2X & Vehicle Connectivity
domains.description: Vehicle connectivity architectures — cellular, V2X, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth — secure and seamless.

domains.title: 360° Connectivity Expertise
domains.description: End-to-end coverage from device to cloud — integrated, validated, and operational.

services.outroSub: We don't just operate today's networks — we help our clients shape the next generation.

consultancy.title: Private 5G Consultancy
consultancy.lead: Concept to live operations — full-stack consultancy for enterprise and industrial Private 5G deployments.

items.title: Network Engineering & Design
items.text: Architecture, RF planning, slicing strategy and integration design — built for your specific industrial environment.

items.title: Project Management & Operations
items.text: End-to-end programme management — milestones, vendor coordination, risk and quality from kick-off to handover.

items.title: Network Management & Operations
items.text: Day-2 operations, monitoring, optimisation and continuous improvement — keeping mission-critical networks healthy.

items.title: Software & Hardware Development
items.text: Custom software and hardware components where the off-the-shelf stack falls short — fully integrated and certified.

items.title: Network Testing & Validation
items.text: Comprehensive testing — functional, performance, interoperability, compliance — before and after go-live.

testing.title: We test until it's perfect
testing.lead: Rigorous, structured validation across the full connectivity stack — for products that have to work in the real world.

items.title: Functional Testing
items.text: End-to-end functional validation across all system components and interfaces — verifying every feature performs precisely as specified.

items.title: Performance & Load Testing
items.text: KPI benchmarking, throughput testing, latency measurement, and stress testing under real-world and worst-case conditions.

items.title: Interoperability Testing
items.text: Multi-vendor integration validation ensuring seamless operation across different vendors, platforms, and protocol stacks.

items.title: Compliance & Homologation
items.text: Regulatory compliance testing and homologation support — ensuring your product meets all required certifications before market entry.

items.title: 5G Network Testing
items.text: RAN, core and slice-level test campaigns — including KPI validation, drive testing and benchmarking.

items.title: eSIM & SIM Testing
items.text: Profile, RSP and lifecycle testing — fully aligned with GSMA specifications.

items.title: OTA Update Testing
items.text: End-to-end validation of OTA campaigns — robustness, rollback, security, and field-relevant scenarios.

items.title: HIL & SIL Testing
items.text: Hardware- and software-in-the-loop test environments for connected and automotive systems.

items.title: IoT Device Validation
items.text: Device-level certification, conformance and ecosystem-readiness testing for massive IoT deployments.

items.title: PoC & Acceptance
items.text: Structured proof-of-concept and acceptance frameworks — measurable, repeatable, decision-ready.

vehicle.title: The modern vehicle platform
vehicle.lead: The modern vehicle is a complex, connected platform — and the demands on its software and communication architecture have never been greater. We deliver expert engineering across the full Connected Car and IVI stack.

items.title: Android Automotive & Auto
items.text: Deep expertise in Android Automotive OS and Android Auto integration — enabling rich, responsive in-vehicle user experiences compliant with OEM and Google ecosystem standards.

items.title: Connectivity Architecture
items.text: End-to-end design of vehicle connectivity frameworks — cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and V2X protocols for seamless, secure data exchange between vehicle, cloud, and external devices.

items.title: Service Management & Auth
items.text: Robust service lifecycle management and security frameworks — IAM, certificate handling, and authorisation flows aligned with automotive cybersecurity standards.

items.title: Functions on Demand
items.text: Architecture and implementation for flexible, subscription-based feature activation — enabling OEMs to unlock capabilities remotely and create new post-sale revenue streams.

items.title: OTA Update Management
items.text: Comprehensive OTA strategy, integration, and validation — ensuring secure, reliable, and compliant software updates across ECUs, IVI systems, and vehicle subsystems.

items.title: ECU Testing & Validation
items.text: Rigorous testing for ECUs and connected vehicle systems — from early-stage verification through system-level integration testing and homologation support.

about.title: About SAJ Connect
about.lead: SAJ Connect GmbH is a specialist technology consultancy at the intersection of wireless communication, automotive innovation and IoT. Founded in December 2025, we combine deep technical knowledge across Telco, Automotive and IoT with a practical, partnership-first approach.
about.leadSecond: Our global team of engineers and consultants collaborates directly with customers — translating complex connectivity challenges into clear, executable strategies and measurable outcomes.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: To foster sustainable 5G innovation and connected-technology adoption through trusted partnerships, end-to-end expertise, and a commitment to excellence — from concept to live operations.

items.text: Decades of combined expertise in mobile communications, 5G and automotive systems.
Direct customer collaboration — from strategy through to live operations.
Proven, scalable partner ecosystem with global reach.
Comprehensive coverage across Private 5G, eSIM, IoT and Connected Car domains.
Agile, multidisciplinary teams — adaptable to your project scale and complexity.

careers.title: Careers at SAJ Connect
careers.lead: We are looking for engineers and consultants who want to shape the future of wireless and automotive connectivity — from day one.
careers.noPositions: No open positions right now — we still welcome unsolicited applications.

blog.title: Blog & Insights
blog.lead: Notes from the field — what we learn building 5G, eSIM, IoT and Connected Car systems.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.lead: Get in touch to discuss how SAJ Connect can support your next project — from initial scoping to full-scale deployment and beyond.

cookie.headline: We respect your privacy
cookie.text: We only use technically necessary cookies. Optionally you can enable cookieless statistics to help us improve the site.

ui.responseLine: We respond within one business day.
